name: Quick Lending, LLC
description_short: Quick Lending is a hard money lender specializing in short-term, asset-based loans for real estate investors in Texas. They offer residential, commercial, and construction financing with closing in as little as five days.
description_long:
Quick Lending, LLC was founded by four managing partners with a mission to serve real estate investors, home flippers, renovators, and builders across Texas. The company operates as a hard money lender—a non-traditional mortgage provider that bases lending decisions on property value rather than credit scores or income qualification. Since inception, Quick Lending has facilitated over $174 million in total loan closings.

The company offers three primary loan products: Residential Loans for single-family through 4-unit properties purchased under LLC or Corporation; Commercial Loans for retail, office, industrial, and apartment complexes of five units and above; and New Construction Loans to finance land, materials, and labor for custom home building. All loans are short-term, interest-only structures designed to bridge the gap between property acquisition and either sale or refinancing. They explicitly do not offer consumer personal loans, maintaining a strict focus on investor-grade lending.

Quick Lending distinguishes itself through speed of closing (as little as five days), no prepayment penalties, no credit checks, no extension fees at 6 or 9 months, and a full 12-month term with flexibility. The company serves five Texas markets: Houston, San Antonio, Dallas-Fort Worth, Austin, and Corpus Christi. They provide an online closing cost calculator and maintain a team of dedicated loan officers and portfolio managers to guide clients through each stage of the process.

As a hard money lender, Quick Lending serves a specific niche—real estate investors who need rapid capital deployment rather than traditional financing. However, borrowers should understand that hard money loans typically carry higher interest rates and origination fees than conventional mortgages, require substantial down payments (minimum 30-40% based on their LTV options), and are structured as short-term bridge financing rather than long-term mortgages. This is appropriate for investment properties but not suitable for primary residence purchases or borrowers seeking traditional 30-year fixed-rate mortgages.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extremely fast closing timeline—as little as five days from application to funding
No credit checks required for qualification—asset and property-based lending only
No prepayment penalties, no extension fees at 6 or 9 months, allowing early payoff flexibility
Online closing cost calculator for transparent upfront fee estimates
Specialized loan programs for residential, commercial, and new construction projects
Dedicated loan officer and portfolio manager support throughout the entire process
Serves five major Texas markets with $174 million in historical loan volume
cons: Hard money loans carry higher interest rates and origination fees than conventional mortgages, increasing overall borrowing costs
Requires significant down payment (minimum 30-40% based on LTV options), limiting access for capital-constrained investors
Short-term loan structure (12-month term) means borrowers must have exit strategy or refinancing plan, creating refinance risk
Limited to Texas service areas only—not available for out-of-state real estate investors
Explicitly does not serve consumer borrowers or primary residence purchases, restricting market applicability
best_for: Real estate investors and house flippers needing rapid capital for property acquisition and renovation
Commercial real estate investors purchasing multi-unit apartments, retail, or industrial properties
Home builders and developers financing custom construction projects with land and labor costs
Wholesale real estate investors requiring bridge financing with flexible repayment structures
diagnosis: Quick Lending is best for real estate investors and professional builders who need fast capital deployment (5 days or less) and prioritize speed over lower interest rates. The primary caveat is that hard money lending is significantly more expensive than traditional mortgages and carries short-term repayment structures; this is appropriate only for investors with clear exit strategies, not for consumers seeking primary residence financing or long-term affordable mortgages.
services: Residential hard money loans for single-family to 4-unit properties under LLC/Corporation
Commercial bridge loans for retail, office, industrial, and 5+ unit apartment complexes
New construction loans covering land, materials, and contractor labor costs
Interest-only loan structures with 12-month terms and no prepayment penalties
Online closing cost calculator with customizable LTV, down payment, and property value inputs
Rapid loan officer consultation and pre-qualification feedback
Documentation collection and submission guidance via dedicated loan officers
Loan transaction management and closing coordination through Customer Relations Manager
Portfolio management and loan draw/payoff process administration
Proof of funds determination and cash-to-close estimates
Full transparency on all fees including origination, processing, legal, title, wire, survey, and prepaid interest
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2050 W Sam Houston Pkwy S Suite 1710, Houston, TX 77042
meta_description: Quick Lending is a Texas hard money lender offering residential, commercial, and construction loans for investors with 5-day closing.
